stem:
The table shows the number of survey respondents who reported their reading preference, by gender.

FictionNonfictionTotal
Female18496280
Male112108220
Total296204500

How many of the females surveyed reported preferring fiction?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. According to the table, 184 females reported preferring fiction.

Choice A is incorrect; this is the number of females preferring nonfiction. Choice B is incorrect; this is the number of males preferring fiction. Choice D is incorrect; this is the total number preferring fiction (all genders).
